common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

error_list.name: voucher.operate_voucher_permission_error
error_list.description: The Voucher created in Shopee admin/Shop Game/Follow Prize/Member ship/Voucher campaign can't be updated

error_list.name: voucher.voucher_min_price_error
error_list.description: Min_basket_price must be higher than the fix amount if Min_basket_price is not 0.

error_list.name: voucher.voucher_btoc_item_blocked_error
error_list.description: Some items cannot be uploaded as they are b2c products in FBS shop

error_list.name: voucher.voucher_display_channel_error
error_list.description: Voucher display channel is set wrongly.

error_list.name: voucher.voucher_end_time_reduce_error
error_list.description: Only allow to shorten the voucher end_time. Cannot extend the end_time.

error_list.name: voucher.voucher_end_time_error
error_list.description: Voucher valid period can not be longer than 3 months.

error_list.name: voucher.fix_amount_low_qualtiy_errorr
error_list.description: Voucher cannot be saved as it is lower than {limit}%. Please adjust the percentage amount to be more than or equal to {limit}%.

error_list.name: voucher.voucher_item_blocked_from_promotion_error
error_list.description: Some items cannot be uploaded as they are prohibited from promotions due to regulations

error_list.name: voucher.voucher_item_duplication_error
error_list.description: Duplicated items in item_id_list.

error_list.name: voucher.voucher_item_count_limit_error
error_list.description: The number of items in item_id_list exceeds the limit.

error_list.name: voucher.voucher_item_not_exist
error_list.description: Some item in item_id_list doesn't exist

error_list.name: voucher.voucher_item_status_error
error_list.description: Not all the items in item_id_list are in normal status.

error_list.name: voucher.voucher_item_stock_error
error_list.description: Some item in item_id_list has 0 stock.

error_list.name: voucher.voucher_max_discount_low_quality
error_list.description: To attract buyers to use your voucher, please increase maximum discount price to > {percentage_input*min_spend*0.01} or reduce minimum basket price to < {max_discount*100/percentage_input} to ensure buyers can enjoy the percentage discount configured.

error_list.name: voucher.voucher_ongoing_param_error
error_list.description: Only limited fields can be modified when the voucher is ongoing. Fileds allow modification: voucher_name,usage_quantity,end_time,display_channel_list, item_id_list

error_list.name: voucher.percentage_low_quality_error
error_list.description: Voucher cannot be saved as it is lower than {limit}.00%. Please adjust the percentage amount to be more than or equal to {limit}.00%.

error_list.name: voucher.voucher_quantity_reduce_error
error_list.description: Only allow to increase the voucher quantity.

error_list.name: voucher.voucher_start_time_error
error_list.description: Voucher start time is earlier than current time.

error_list.name: voucher.voucher_time_period_error
error_list.description: Voucher end time must be 1 hour later than the start time.

common_error_list.name: error_param

request_params.name: voucher_id
request_params.description: The unique identifier of the voucher which is going to be updated.

request_params.name: start_time
request_params.description: The timing from when the voucher is valid; so buyer is allowed to claim and to use. Field can only be updated if voucher has not started.

request_params.name: end_time
request_params.description: The timing until when the voucher is still valid. Any time after this end_time, buyer is not allowed to claim or to use.

request_params.name: usage_quantity
request_params.description: The number of times for this particular voucher could be used.

request_params.name: min_basket_price
request_params.description: The minimum spend required for using this voucher.

request_params.name: discount_amount
request_params.description: The discount amount set for this particular voucher. Only fill in when you are updating a fix amount voucher.

request_params.name: percentage
request_params.description: The discount percentage set for this particular voucher. Only fill in when you are updating a discount percentage voucher or coins cashback voucher.

request_params.name: max_price
request_params.description: The max amount of discount/value a user can enjoy by using this particular voucher. Only fill in when you are updating a discount percentage voucher or coins cashback voucher.

request_params.name: display_channel_list
request_params.description: The FE channel where the voucher will be displayed. The available values are: 1: display_all, 2: order page, 3: feed, 4: live streaming,   [] (empty - which is hidden).

request_params.name: item_id_list
request_params.description: The list of items which is applicable for the voucher. Only fill in when you are updating a product type of voucher.

request_params.name: display_start_time
request_params.description: The timing of when voucher is displayed on shop pages; so buyer is allowed to claim.

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: message
response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier of the API request for error tracking.

children.name: voucher_id
children.description: The unique identifier of the voucher which is being updated.
